name: Day 22 — AI Document Q&A over Google Drive (RAG)

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $json.folder_id ? `'${$json.folder_id}' in parents and fullText contains '${$json.question.replace(/'/g, "\\\'")}' and trashed = false` : `fullText contains '${$json.question.replace(/'/g, "\\\'")}' and trashed = false` }}

_readme.workflow: Day 22 — AI Document Q&A over Google Drive (RAG)
_readme.description: Ask any question in plain English and get an AI-powered answer sourced from your actual Google Drive documents. No vector database required.
_readme.flow: POST /doc-qa → Normalize → Validate → Drive Search → Loop Files → Export Text → Truncate → Aggregate → Build Context → GPT-4o-mini → Parse Answer → Sheets Log → Slack (optional) → Return JSON
setup_steps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (drag-drop or paste)
2. Add credentials: Google Drive OAuth, Google Sheets OAuth, OpenAI API key, Slack OAuth (optional)
3. Create a Google Sheet with tab named 'QA Log' — columns will auto-populate
4. Activate workflow — copy the webhook URL
5. POST to the webhook: { question, folder_id (optional), max_docs, sheet_id, asked_by, slack_enabled }

body.question: What is the refund policy for enterprise customers?

example_response.question: What is the refund policy for enterprise customers?
example_response.answer: According to the Enterprise Agreement document, enterprise customers are eligible for a full refund within 30 days of purchase if the product does not meet the agreed SLA benchmarks.
example_response.summary: Enterprise customers get 30-day refund if SLA benchmarks are not met.
follow_up_questions: What are the SLA benchmark definitions?
How do I initiate a refund request?

_readme.sell_value: $250–$800 setup | $1,500–$3,000 for custom knowledge base + UI | $75–$200/month retainer
use_cases: Sales enablement (find product specs, pricing, case studies instantly)
Customer support (answer from SOPs and docs)
Student research assistant over personal Drive
